scripts.build: yarn && yarn clean && (cd src && make clean && make js) && yarn mv
scripts.compile-commands: cd src && compiledb make all && mv compile_commands.json ..
scripts.dist: command -v http-server >/dev/null 2>&1 || npx --no-install http-server --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Error: http-server not found. Run "yarn install" first.'; exit 1; } && http-server dist -p 8080 -c-1
